title: divergence log when not composing
purpose: B4.4 defines divergence log when not composing for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B4.4` only; siblings under `B4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: When [B4.3](B4.3-compose-first-catalog-before-improvise.md) compose-first cannot find a suitable component, the conductor records a divergence log entry: what was searched, why composition failed, what was invented instead, and a promotion candidate id for the platform queue.
Divergence is an audit trail for invention—not failure—feeding [D2.1.1](D2.1.1-enqueue-repeated-manual-command-2x.md) self-improvement enqueue when patterns repeat.
Silent invention without a log blocks pack maturity claims and makes [SEC-14](SEC-14-gap-analysis.md) gap analysis untrustworthy.
Reviewers may sample divergence logs for duplicate patterns to prioritize promotion; conductors must not mark phase complete when required divergence metadata is missing.
If divergence logs reference nonexistent promotion ids or omit search scope, preflight fails closed until journal-keeper reconciles the Plane E record.

narrative: B4.4 defines divergence log when not composing for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system when [b4.3](b4.3-compose-first-catalog-before-improvise.md) compose-first cannot find a suitable component, the conductor records a divergence log entry: what was searched, why composition failed, what was invented instead, and a promotion candidate id for the platform queue, then divergence is an audit trail for invention—not failure—feeding [d2.1.1](d2.1.1-enqueue-repeated-manual-command-2x.md) self-improvement enqueue when patterns repeat.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

When compose-first cannot find a suitable component, the conductor records a divergence log entry: what was searched, why composition failed, what was invented instead, and promotion candidate id for the platform queue.

Divergence is not failure—it is an audit trail for what was invented instead of reused, feeding future self-improvement work. Silent invention without log blocks pack maturity claims and makes SEC-14 gap analysis untrustworthy. Reviewers may sample divergence logs for duplicate patterns to prioritize promotion.
